particulars.description: The freehold property known as arnescote farm, stapleford road, whissendine, oakham. Together with all buildings and fixtures (including trade fixtures) fixed plant and machinery by way of fixed charge all present and future book and other debts floating charge over all moveable plant machinery implements utensils furniture and equipment by way of assignment the goodwill of the business (if any) the full benefit of all licences and all guarantees.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
